title: cinnagrostis scaberula
intro: Cinnagrostis scaberula, also known as Korean sand sedge or Japanese cinnagrostis, is a type of grass native to East Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of Cinnagrostis scaberula often involve making infusions or teas from the leaves and stems, as well as using it in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
